ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "chain_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the chain */,
  "chain_length" INTEGER /* Length of the chain */,
  "total_asa" REAL /* Total solvent-accessible surface area of the protein */,
  "b_bone_asa" REAL /* Solvent-accessible surface area of the backbone */,
  "s_chain_asa" REAL /* Solvent-accessible surface area of the side chain */,
  "polar_asa" REAL /* Solvent-accessible surface area of polar residues */,
  "n_polar_asa" REAL /* Solvent-accessible surface area of non-polar residues */,
  "protein_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the protein */,
  "protein_sequence" TEXT /* The amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date when the protein structure was uploaded */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source from which the protein structure was obtained */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who uploaded the protein structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chains" (
  "chain_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the chain */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the chain belongs to */,
  "chain_name" TEXT /* Name of the chain */,
  "chain_length" INTEGER /* Length of the chain */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* The amino acid sequence of the chain */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date when the chain information was added */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who added the chain information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chains_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chains_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residues" (
  "residue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each residue */,
  "chain_id" TEXT /* ID of the chain the residue belongs to */,
  "residue_name" TEXT /* Name of the residue (e.g., SER, HIS, MET) */,
  "residue_asa" REAL /* Solvent-accessible surface area of the residue */,
  "b_bone_asa" REAL /* Solvent-accessible surface area of the backbone */,
  "s_chain_asa" REAL /* Solvent-accessible surface area of the side chain */,
  "polar_asa" REAL /* Solvent-accessible surface area of polar residues */,
  "n_polar_asa" REAL /* Solvent-accessible surface area of non-polar residues */,
  "sequence_position" INTEGER /* The position of the residue in the chain sequence */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date when the residue information was added */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who added the residue information */,
  "residue_type" TEXT /* The type of residue (e.g., polar, non-polar, aromatic) */,
  "hydrophobicity_score" REAL /* A score indicating the hydrophobicity of the residue */,
  "charge" TEXT /* The charge of the residue (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("residue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residues_chain_id FOREIGN KEY ("chain_id") REFERENCES chains ("chain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residues_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* A hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
